query:
SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.name, p.isActive,
       COUNT(pc.id) as city_count
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
WHERE p.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.userId, p.name, p.isActive
HAVING city_count = 0
ORDER BY p.id;
